title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Great Learning - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Great Learning - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
